field.label: Enable PharosVPN
field.help: Activate PharosVPN and bring up the enabled client connection on reconfigure / boot.

field.label: Profile signer public key
field.help: The controller's ed25519 profile-signing public key (base64). Required only to open account-mode profiles. Leave blank for none/password-mode profiles.

field.label: Device key (account mode)
field.help: This device's X25519 private key (base64), needed to open account-mode profiles unattended. Leave blank for none/password-mode profiles. Stored at rest in config.xml — prefer password-mode profiles where possible.
